## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [coding standards](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-standards)
- [ ] I have tested these changes manually
- [ ] I have updated documentation if this change affects installation, configuration, or usage
- [ ] I have updated `.env.example` if I added a new environment variable
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, hardcoded IPs, or personal data are included
- [ ] No debug `print()` statements are left in the code
